allow: PowerShell($codeCmd = \(Get-Command code.cmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $codeCmd\) { $codeCmd = \(Get-Command code -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; if \($codeCmd\) { & $codeCmd "e:\\my-git-repos\\static-pages\\ratevault-crm"; "Opened with: $codeCmd" } else { "code CLI not found on PATH" })

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 13000 -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Stopped 13000" } catch { "13000 not running: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)
